---
title: "Software"
---

<!-- This file is auto-generated by data/generate_software_page.R -->
<!-- Last updated: 2026-05-13T07:15:04Z -->

## R Packages on CRAN

| Package | Status | Description | CRAN | GitHub | Docs | Publication | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|--------|-------------|------|--------|------|-------------|:----------:|:--------:|
| serocalculator | Active | Estimate seroconversion rates and frequencies from antibody levels in cross-sectional samples | [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=serocalculator) | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/serocalculator) | [Docs](https://ucd-serg.github.io/serocalculator/) |  | [198](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/serocalculator/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [8](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/serocalculator/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |
| rwicc | Archived | Regression with interval-censored covariates | [CRAN Archive](https://CRAN.R-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/rwicc) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rwicc) | [Docs](https://d-morrison.github.io/rwicc/) | [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1111/biom.13472) | [8](https://github.com/d-morrison/rwicc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [1](https://github.com/d-morrison/rwicc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |

---

## My Repositories

Repositories under my personal GitHub account, the [UCD-SERG](https://github.com/UCD-SERG) organization, and other organizations where I am an author or maintainer.

### R Packages

| Package | Description | GitHub | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|-------------|--------|:----------:|:--------:|
| rmb | Data sets from *Regression Methods in Biostatistics* (Vittinghoff et al.) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rmb) | 0 | 0 |
| snapr | Convenient snapshot testing functions for R packages | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr) | [3](https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| pr.helpers | Generalization of pull-request helper functions from `{usethis}` | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/pr.helpers) | [1](https://github.com/d-morrison/pr.helpers/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| binom.se | Sample size calculations for Bernoulli probability estimation | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/binom.se) | 0 | 0 |
| CSICalc | Methods for estimating incidence from cross-sectional biomarker surveys | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/CSICalc) | 0 | 0 |
| ping | Graph ping data in R | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/ping) | 0 | 0 |
| ucdavis/rSuStaIn | R implementation of the SuStaIn (Subtype and Stage Inference) algorithm | [GitHub](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn) | [1](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| ucdavis/serodynamics | Modeling longitudinal immune seroresponses to infections | [GitHub](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics) | [58](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [3](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |
| UCLA-PHP/FluView | Flu surveillance data visualization | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/FluView) | [9](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/FluView/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |

### Quarto Extensions

| Extension | Description | GitHub | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|-------------|--------|:----------:|:--------:|
| slidebreak | Insert slide breaks into Quarto revealjs presentations | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/slidebreak) | 0 | 0 |
| revealjs-html-links | Enable HTML-style links in revealjs presentations | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/revealjs-html-links) | 0 | 0 |
| div-anchors | Anchors for theorem-variant divs in Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/div-anchors) | 0 | 0 |
| equation-anchors | Anchors for numbered equations in Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/equation-anchors) | 0 | 0 |
| qet | Quarto extension template | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/qet) | 0 | 0 |
| macros | Shared macro definitions for Quarto documents | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/macros) | [7](https://github.com/d-morrison/macros/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [1](https://github.com/d-morrison/macros/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |

### Quarto Books & Templates

| Project | Description | GitHub | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|-------------|--------|:----------:|:--------:|
| rme | *Regression Models for Epidemiology* — an open Quarto textbook | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme) | [167](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [4](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |
| qwt | Template for building websites with Quarto | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/qwt) | [6](https://github.com/d-morrison/qwt/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |

### Shiny Applications

| App | Description | GitHub | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|-------------|--------|:----------:|:--------:|
| shiny.demos | Teaching demos for Shiny applications | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/shiny.demos) | 0 | 0 |
| UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator | Shiny app for the `serocalculator` package | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator) | [2](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve | Shiny app to display antibody decay curves | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve) | [1](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [1](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |
| UCLA-PHP/wastewater | Wastewater surveillance dashboard | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/wastewater) | [2](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/wastewater/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |

### Analysis & Research Code

| Repo | Description | GitHub | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|---------|-------------|--------|:----------:|:--------:|
| UCD-IDDRC/fxtas | Analysis code for Fragile X-associated tremor/ataxia syndrome (FXTAS) | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-IDDRC/fxtas) | [106](https://github.com/UCD-IDDRC/fxtas/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | [4](https://github.com/UCD-IDDRC/fxtas/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aopen+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) |
| ucdavis/win | UC Davis WIN (Workforce Inequity in Neuroscience) project | [GitHub](https://github.com/ucdavis/win) | [3](https://github.com/ucdavis/win/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| ucdavis/ettbc | Analysis code for enteric disease burden estimation | [GitHub](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc) | [1](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm | Agent-based model of infection dynamics in K-6 schools during COVID-19 | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm) | [2](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior | Longitudinal models of toothbrushing behavior | [GitHub](https://github.com/ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior) | [3](https://github.com/ROBAS-UCLA/Brushing-Behavior/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| vax.eff | Code from "Estimating Vaccine Effectiveness from Linking Population-Based Health Registries" (Brookmeyer & Morrison, *AJE*, 2022) | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/vax.eff) | 0 | 0 |
| LA.Vax.Data | Pre-processes LA County vaccination rates by community statistical area | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/LA.Vax.Data) | 0 | 0 |
| hybrid.charts.la | Adaptation of Wisconsin COVID-19 data visualizations for Los Angeles County | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/hybrid.charts.la) | 0 | 0 |
| UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence | Analysis of seroincidence of enteric fever in Juba, South Sudan | [GitHub](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence) | 0 | 0 |
| EM.examples | Examples of EM algorithms | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/EM.examples) | 0 | 0 |
| github-stats | Tools for computing personal GitHub contribution statistics | [GitHub](https://github.com/d-morrison/github-stats) | 0 | 0 |

---

## External Contributions

Pull requests I have authored or been assigned to in repositories outside my own accounts, ordered by number of merged PRs.

| Repository | Description | Merged PRs | Open PRs |
|------------|-------------|:----------:|:--------:|
| [hadley/mastering-shiny](https://github.com/hadley/mastering-shiny) | *Mastering Shiny* book by Hadley Wickham | [9](https://github.com/hadley/mastering-shiny/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [ajmichaelucd/mic.sim](https://github.com/ajmichaelucd/mic.sim) | Simulation of minimum inhibitory concentration (MIC) distributions | [6](https://github.com/ajmichaelucd/mic.sim/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [ucjug/workshop_julia_basics](https://github.com/ucjug/workshop_julia_basics) | UC Davis Julia Users Group introductory workshop materials | [3](https://github.com/ucjug/workshop_julia_basics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem) | Quarto extension for callout-style theorem environments | [1](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR](https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR) | R package for tidying REDCap exports | [1](https://github.com/CHOP-CGTInformatics/REDCapTidieR/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [Nowosad/colorblindcheck](https://github.com/Nowosad/colorblindcheck) | R package for checking colorblind accessibility of color palettes | [1](https://github.com/Nowosad/colorblindcheck/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [r-quantities/units](https://github.com/r-quantities/units) | Measurement units for R vectors | [1](https://github.com/r-quantities/units/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [r-lib/scales](https://github.com/r-lib/scales) | Scale functions for ggplot2 | [1](https://github.com/r-lib/scales/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [easystats/parameters](https://github.com/easystats/parameters) | Parameters and statistical summaries for model objects in R | [1](https://github.com/easystats/parameters/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [glmmTMB/glmmTMB](https://github.com/glmmTMB/glmmTMB) | Generalized linear mixed models via Template Model Builder | [1](https://github.com/glmmTMB/glmmTMB/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
| [edwindj/ffbase](https://github.com/edwindj/ffbase) | Base R functions for `ff` large-data objects | [1](https://github.com/edwindj/ffbase/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged+%28author%3Ad-morrison+OR+assignee%3Ad-morrison%29) | 0 |
